name: Blender Souffle
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon French cream mustard (May substitute 1/2 tablespoon dry mustard)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the cheese into pieces.
2. Combine all ingredients in a blender.
3. Turn on high speed until thoroughly mixed.
4. Grease and cover a 1-1/2 quart casserole dish with parchment paper or aluminum foil.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared casserole dish.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour.
